Name: Salesforce - Lead Automation System
Description__c: Automated lead management system built on Salesforce Platform. Captures portfolio inquiries, creates and upserts leads, sends email notifications, assigns follow-up tasks, and runs daily scheduled checks to ensure timely outreach.
Tech_Stack__c: Apex, Lightning Web Components, Platform Events, Record Triggered Flow, Schedule Triggered Flow

Name: Salesforce - LWC Portfolio
Description__c:
A fully data-driven personal portfolio site built on Salesforce Experience Cloud using Lightning Web Components — no templates, just clean code backed by live Salesforce data.

Update a record in Salesforce, the site updates instantly. Work experience, projects, skills, and certifications are all managed directly from the Salesforce org.
Tech_Stack__c: Apex, Lightning Web Components, Experience Cloud

Name: Salesforce - Spendly Expense Tracker
Description__c: A full-featured expense tracking app built entirely with Salesforce Lightning Web Components (LWC). No external libraries, no third-party charts — just pure LWC, Apex, and CSS.
